name: pruner-arch
description: Pruner (Pruning Architect) — a top-down backcasting skill that designs toward a possibly-non-existent regulative ideal, fractally decomposes a problem into automatable (linear) vs non-automatable (non-linear) parts, defers the non-linear core as human-judgment-and-responsibility black boxes, and discovers (not designs) a control panel as the synthesis of minimized human interventions. Activates on [Pruner]/pruner or 가지치기.
author: sng2c
